MainPage.welcomeDescription: Sign in or create an account to start using our REST Client
MainPage.welcomeBackDescription: You can work with REST API requests
MainPage.projectDescription: REST Client is a powerful lightweight tool for testing RESTful APIs, inspired by Postman but built with modern React frameworks. It provides a comprehensive interface for making HTTP requests, inspecting responses, and managing API workflows.
MainPage.feature1: Multiple HTTP methods support (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.)
MainPage.feature2: Request body editor with JSON/Text support
MainPage.courseDescription: This project was developed as part of the RS School React course, which provides comprehensive training in modern React development, TypeScript, and full-stack application building.
MainPage.courseLink: Learn more about RS School React course
MainPage.highlight1: Modern React with Hooks and Context API
MainPage.highlight3: Next.js App Router for full-stack applications
